description_long: This object consists of two white, partially melted candles, each set in a decorative black and gold holder. The candles are short and thick, with visible wax drips and irregular tops, indicating prior use. The holders are cylindrical, with one featuring a wide, flat base and a metallic gold band, while the other is more compact and simple. Both holders have subtle gold swirl patterns as accents, adding an ornate touch. The wicks are visible at the tops of the candles, but there is no flame present. The overall appearance suggests a vintage or classic style, suitable for decorative use in urban interiors or outdoor settings.
description: Two white, partially melted candles with visible wax drips are set in ornate black and gold holders, one with a wide base and the other compact. The design is classic and decorative, with visible wicks and no flames.
description_view_0: Front view showing both candles side by side, highlighting the ornate gold band and wide base of the left holder and the compact design of the right holder.
description_view_1: Rear angled view focusing on the backs of the candles, emphasizing the wax drips and the cylindrical shape of the holders.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the irregular tops of the candles and the decorative gold accents on the holders.
description_view_3: Back view showing the wide base of the left holder and the gold band, with both candles' wax drips visible.
